papers_mined.title: Bessemer process (Wikipedia)
papers_mined.note: Air blast through tuyeres at bottom of converter; oxidizes Si then Mn then C in sequence; decarburizes pig iron 4-5%C to steel <1%C in 10-20min.

papers_mined.title: Bessemer Process Key Steelmaking
papers_mined.note: Bottom-injection oxidation cascade Si→Mn→C; impurity removal in sequence.

papers_mined.title: Bessemer Process Revolutionizing Steelmaking
papers_mined.note: Forced air upward; oxidation cascades through molten bath.

papers_mined.title: Noise Injection Systemically Degrades LLM Safety Guardrails (2025/05)
papers_mined.note: Gaussian noise injected into activations; raises harmful-output rate by 27%; noise injection method study.

papers_mined.title: Dynamic Noise Preference Optimization (DNPO)
papers_mined.note: Trainable noise in preference optimization; dynamic sample labeling.

papers_mined.title: Cyclical loss-based optimization for pretraining on noisy data
papers_mined.note: Cyclical thresholds for filtering noisy samples; robust loss-based selection.
